content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 22, 2026, focused on mobile infrastructure, cloud architecture, and system stability. Key achievements include the integration of local voice and sandbox routing for mobile, a transition to a two-tier Hetzner control plane, and the deprecation of unused container features. Core logic was hardened through improved task routing and proactive inbox management, while the `chip` and `app-core` packages saw significant maintenance and optimization.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Mobile & Sandbox Infrastructure**
*   Implemented local voice and sandbox routing for mobile platforms, supporting remote-mode plugins ([#7850](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7850)).
*   Stabilized gpt-oss routing and OpenCode handoffs by refining planner and tool contracts ([#7881](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7881)).
*   Updated `chip` package scripts to improve Linux external BSP checks and reporting ([#7877](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7877)).

**Cloud & Infrastructure Refactoring**
*   Transitioned Hetzner infrastructure to a two-tier architecture using Terraform IaC and deprecated legacy milady-core components ([#7890](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7890)).
*   Removed unused container CRUD features from the dashboard, merging functionality into the agents UI ([#7886](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7886)).
*   Hardened Steward checkout callbacks for hardware authentication and corrected BNB icon/i18n strings in the cloud frontend ([#7891](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7891), [#7892](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7892)).

**System Stability & Maintenance**
*   Refined proactive LifeOps inbox digests to prevent chat connector memories from appearing as unread personal items ([#7889](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7889)).
*   Performed type cleanup for Slack WebClient ([#7882](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7882)) and allowlisted service type migrations to resolve test collisions ([#7880](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7880)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7893](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7893): fix(os-rv64): keep release gates source-only honest.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#7748](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7748) [Tool Suggestion] Unified DeFi Router: The contributor announced that the DeFi routing tool is now live and fully functional via a centralized API, providing optimal swap and bridge routes for agents.
